
```{r}


### input data examples ###
## #input file example
## > head(metaDatAga2)
##           sample_alias                  junctionFile
##  1   HeLa_DMSO+U1ag_R1 DB-61-WI27-star.SJ.out.tab.gz
##  2   HeLa_DMSO+U1ag_R2 ZB-61-WL27-star.SJ.out.tab.gz
##  3   HeLa_DMSO+U1ag_R3 VB-61-WP27-star.SJ.out.tab.gz
##  4 HeLa_LMI070+U1ag_R3 RB-61-WT27-star.SJ.out.tab.gz
##  5 HeLa_LMI070+U1ag_R1 NB-61-WX27-star.SJ.out.tab.gz
##  6 HeLa_LMI070+U1ag_R2 JB-62-WB27-star.SJ.out.tab.gz

## # input example with all possible 5'ss
## > head(newDJE2)
## GRanges object with 6 ranges and 4 metadata columns:
##              seqnames    ranges strand |   gene_name    inGtex intronStart     exonEnd
##                 <Rle> <IRanges>  <Rle> | <character> <numeric> <character> <character>
##   1:492077:+        1    492077      + |        none         1    GTCTCCAG        GGGA
##   1:492149:+        1    492149      + |        none         1    GTGCGATC        CCGA
##   1:523028:+        1    523028      + |        none         1    GTCGAGGC        AGGA
##   1:632552:+        1    632552      + |    MTCO1P12         1    GTGACTAT        TGGA
##   1:727152:+        1    727152      + |        none         1    GTGCGATC        CCGA
##   1:850612:+        1    850612      + |   LINC01128         1    GTTAGTGA        TTGA
##   -------
##   seqinfo: 25 sequences from an unspecified genome; no seqlengths


countStuff <- function( metaDat, candidatesToConsider ){
    rownames(metaDat) <- metaDat$sample_alias
    allCounts <- lapply( rownames(metaDat), function(samp){
        ## reading junction data ##
        juncData <- parseJunctionFile(metaDat[samp,"junctionFile"])
        juncData <- juncData[strand(juncData) != "*"]
        junctionStart <- flank( juncData, -1 )
        exonStart <- flank(candidatesToConsider, 1)
        junctionStart <- flank( juncData, -1 )
        exonEnd <- flank( candidatesToConsider, 1, start=FALSE )
        endOvl <- findOverlaps( exonEnd, junctionStart, type="equal" )
        endOvl <- ovlToDF( endOvl, candidatesToConsider, juncData, type="end" )
        ovlSkip <- findOverlaps( candidatesToConsider, juncData, type="within" )
        ovlSkip <- ovlToDF( ovlSkip, candidatesToConsider, juncData, type="skip" )
        endOvl$junctionCoordEnd <- as.character(flank( GRanges( endOvl$junctionCoord ), -1, start=FALSE ))
        ovlSkip$junctionCoordEnd <- as.character(flank( GRanges( ovlSkip$junctionCoord ), -1, start=FALSE ))
        endOvl <- endOvl |>
            dplyr::group_by( exonCoords, junctionCoordEnd ) |>
            dplyr::summarize( counts=sum(counts) ) |>
            dplyr::rename( inclusion=counts )
        ovlSkip <- ovlSkip |>
            dplyr::group_by( exonCoords, junctionCoordEnd ) |>
            dplyr::summarize( counts=sum(counts) ) |>
            dplyr::rename( exclusion=counts )
        allCounts <- dplyr::full_join( endOvl, ovlSkip ) |>
            dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::where(is.numeric), ~tidyr::replace_na(.x, 0)))
        allCounts <- allCounts |>
            dplyr::group_by( exonCoords ) |>
            dplyr::summarize( inclusion=sum(inclusion), exclusion=sum(exclusion) )
        allCounts$psi <- allCounts$inclusion / (allCounts$inclusion + allCounts$exclusion)
        allCounts$sample <- samp
        allCounts
    })
    allCounts <- dplyr::bind_rows( allCounts )
    allCounts <- allCounts |>
        dplyr::left_join(
                   data.frame(
                       exonCoords=names(candidatesToConsider),
                       exonEnd=candidatesToConsider$exonEnd,
                       intronStart=candidatesToConsider$intronStart))
    allCounts
}


allCountsAga <- countStuff( metaDatAga2, newDJE2 )
write.table( allCountsAga, file="counts_aga5ss.txt", row.names=FALSE, col.names=TRUE, quote=FALSE, sep="\t" )

```
